sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81640" key="perile/gw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιλέγω</orth>, <sense id="n81640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">express by circumlocution</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:92" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">92</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:125" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.125</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
